exemplar.title: How Does Karunatilaka Use Postmodern Elements in "The Seven Moons of Maali Almeida" To Create a Historical Narrative of the Sri Lankan Civil War?

detailedExemplarData.title: How Does Karunatilaka Use Postmodern Elements in "The Seven Moons of Maali Almeida" To Create a Historical Narrative of the Sri Lankan Civil War?

subject.title: English A Lit
subject.description:
**IB English A Literature** is a **Group 1** subject in the **International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP)**. It explores **literary texts from diverse cultures, genres, and time periods**, with a strong focus on **critical analysis, interpretation, and understanding of how literature reflects and shapes human experience through themes, cultural contexts, and global issues**.

The course is available at **Standard Level (SL, 150 teaching hours)** and **Higher Level (HL, 240 teaching hours)**, with **first assessment in 2021**.

### Assessment at a Glance

| Assessment | Format | SL | HL | Weighting |
|------------|--------|----|----|-----------|
| **Paper 1** | Unseen literary text analysis | 1h 15m | 2h 15m | 35% |
| **Paper 2** | Comparative essay on studied works | 1h 45m | 1h 45m | 40% |
| **Individual Oral** | Oral presentation on global issues | 10 minutes | 10 minutes | 25% |

strengths: Topic and purpose are communicated accurately and effectively from the outset
Research question is sharply focused and consistently linked to all analytical sections
Methodology employs a broad, relevant range of sources and methods integrated into the argument
weaknesses: No explicit methodology statement in the introduction to explain source selection rationale
Over-reliance on journalistic reviews rather than peer-reviewed scholarship in places
Conclusion omits reflection on methodological limitations
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The investigation demonstrates a clear, accurate focus throughout, with a sharply defined research question and logical section headings that maintain purpose. The methodology is largely completeâwith thoughtful choice of primary and secondary sourcesâand is effective in supporting the analysis. Minor omissions (an explicit methods rationale in the introduction and reflection on limitations in the conclusion), however, prevent a topâband mark, placing the work solidly at 5/6.

strengths: Displays solid, coherent knowledge of the novel and its Sri Lankan historical context
Consistent, mostly accurate use of subject-specific terminology (e.g., âunreliable narrator,â âmetatextualityâ)
Close readings are well-selected and effectively integrated
weaknesses: Relies heavily on generalist sources for historical context rather than peer-reviewed scholarship
Occasional conceptual imprecisions (e.g., conflating metafiction with magical realism)
Limited engagement with specialist post-colonial or narratological theory
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay shows good understanding of topic and sources and uses appropriate terminology to support analytical claims. However, gaps in scholarly depthâespecially in contextualizing contested eventsâand minor lapses in conceptual precision constrain the performance to the competent band, meriting 4/6.

strengths: Research draws on a wide, relevant range of sources directly linked to the question
Analysis frequently integrates textual detail with contextual material to support arguments
Demonstrates solid engagement with contrasting perspectives and historiographical theory
weaknesses: Some analytical sections repeat earlier summaries instead of advancing the argument
Counter-arguments and theoretical limitations (e.g., post-modern relativism) are noted but not fully interrogated
The conclusion largely summarizes rather than providing deeper synthesis or evaluative insight
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The studentâs critical thinking shows good research relevance and mostly well-supported analysis, with clear argument development across sections. Repetition of points and only partial evaluation of counter-arguments and implications limit the depth of evaluation. Overall, the work sits in the mid-range of the criterion, justifying 6/12.

strengths: Clearly appropriate overall structure with logical sectional headings and table of contents
Adheres to IB conventions (title page, pagination, citation style)
Section headers (âUnreliable Narrator,â âGood and Evil,â etc.) enhance navigation
weaknesses: Inconsistent leader dots and spacing in the table of contents
Bibliography entries are duplicate and inconsistently formatted
Dense, run-on paragraphs hinder readability in places
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: Presentation is generally well-organized and meets IB requirements, with clear sections and consistent navigation aids. Minor layout inconsistencies and formatting lapses prevent a flawless execution, placing it at 3/4.

strandSelections.reasoning:
**A broad and appropriate range of primary and secondary sources is evident, indicating thoughtful methodological choices,** e.g., the novel itself, scholarly articles, critical reviews and contextual histories of the civil war. Citations are generally accurate and integrated into the argument.  
Nevertheless, the essay does not expressly outline its methodological rationale in the introduction, and the conclusion omits reflection on methodological limitations. Occasional over-reliance on journalistic reviews rather than peer-reviewed literary scholarship also slightly weakens evidential balance.  
These minor gaps prevent the work from reaching the very top of the band, but overall the methodology is clearly complete, purposeful and effective.

**Mandatory layout elementsâword count, pagination, consistent citation style and works-cited listâare present and largely correct,** meeting fundamental IB requirements.  
However, the bibliography displays a few duplicate and inconsistently formatted entries; section headers vary slightly in style, and sporadic spacing/alignment issues detract from overall polish. These shortcomings indicate that layout considerations, while mostly applied, are not flawless.  
Accordingly, the strand fits the lower end of the 3â4 band, warranting a score of 3.

**Research is wide-ranging and well aligned to the question.** The student cites primary text, historical reports (HRW, CFR), critical essays, newspaper reviews and theoretical guides, demonstrating breadth and relevance.  
Most sources illuminate either post-modern technique or Sri Lankan history, and their selection appears purposeful. Occasional dependence on journalistic commentary instead of peer-reviewed scholarship slightly limits scholarly depth, but does not undermine overall relevance.  
The sustained connection between sources and argument evidences good, mostly consistent alignment with the research question, meriting a solid position in the 7â9 band.

**The topic is stated with precision and purpose from the title page onward.** The student immediately identifies the novel, the literary lens (post-modern techniques) and the historical frame (Sri Lankan civil war), allowing readers to understand what the investigation will cover.  
â¢ In the opening paragraph the student succinctly explains the novelâs premise, historical setting and thematic focus, demonstrating a clear sense of direction.  
â¢ Throughout the essay, each section heading (âThe Unreliable Narrator,â âGood and Evil,â âMetatextualityâ) maintains a strong, logical link to the overarching topic, confirming that the topic remains central and clearly communicated at every stage.

**The discussion develops a clear argument linking post-modern techniques to historical representation and revisits it in each section,** showing organization and some evaluative intent (e.g., weighing Maaliâs bias against journalistic accounts).  
Nevertheless, evaluation of counter-arguments is brief; for instance, the potential shortcomings of post-modern relativism are noted but not fully interrogated, and the conclusion mainly recaps earlier points without significant new synthesis. These factors restrain critical depth.  
The essay therefore reflects a good but not fully critical discussion, aligning with the mid-range (4â6) performance level.

**Analytical passages frequently integrate close textual readings with contextual material to build persuasive claims**âe.g., the statistical anaphora illustrating Maaliâs unreliability or the dual reading of Rajapaksaâs characterization. Logical progression across sections is generally coherent, and claims are usually substantiated by quotation or secondary commentary.  
Yet several paragraphs reiterate earlier points (notably in the âGood and Evilâ section), and some assertions about historiography rely on secondary paraphrase rather than independent critical synthesis. These repetitions and occasional generalizations temper the overall incisiveness.  
Consequently, the analysis is strong and largely supported, characteristic of the lower edge of the 7â9 band rather than its peak.

**The essay follows IB EE conventions with a clear title page, abstract substitute, table of contents, logical sectional headings and coherent progression,** facilitating reader navigation.  
Minor flawsâsuch as uneven leader dots, occasional overlong paragraphs and limited signposting in the conclusionâslightly affect the smoothness but do not compromise overall structural appropriateness.  
Given the generally strong yet not flawless organization, the work sits comfortably at the top of the 3â4 band.

**The student displays solid knowledge of both the novel and its historical context,** supplying concise background on the Sri Lankan conflict and weaving it into literary analysis. Close readings (e.g., of Maaliâs narration and Senaâs dialogue) show familiarity with textual detail.  
However, the essay leans heavily on popular journalism and book reviews; engagement with specialist post-colonial or narratological scholarship is limited. This occasionally restricts the depth of contextual nuance, especially when discussing contested historical events.  
The understanding communicated is therefore good rather than exceptional, aligning with the middle-to-upper level of this band.

**Subject terminology such as âunreliable narrator,â âmetatextuality,â âinside/outside factâ and âmagical realismâ is used regularly and mostly accurately,** demonstrating comfort with key literary and historiographical concepts.  
There are, however, sporadic imprecisionsâfor instance, conflating metafiction with magical realism and briefly mis-distinguishing post-modernismâs epistemic skepticism. These lapses are minor but indicate that conceptual use is not uniformly precise.  
Overall, terminology supports the analysis effectively, yet the occasional slippage keeps performance within the competent (3â4) band.

**The research question is explicitly worded, sharply focused and drives the whole discussion.** By asking how Karunatilakaâs use of post-modern elements constructs a historical narrative, the student sets a manageable, literature-specific line of inquiry.  
All analytical sections map directly onto this question: examinations of unreliability, moral ambiguity and metatextuality each test ways in which post-modern devices shape historical representation. Transitions and topic sentences regularly restate the research questionâs key terms, ensuring sustained relevance.  
The consistent linkage between evidence, sub-arguments and the question shows an effective anchoring of the essayâs structure to the chosen focus.

annotations.comment: The metatextuality discussion would be strengthened by explicitly tying its implications back to how postmodern devices shape the historical narrative.
The metaphor of photographs as âforensic witnessingâ effectively bridges literary analysis with historiographical method, showcasing strong critical insight.
The âUnreliable Narratorâ section header is clearly labeled, facilitating coherent organization of analytical themes.
Analysis here reiterates previously stated definitions of the unreliable narrator; condense summary to focus on deeper critical synthesis.
The discussion of Lawtonâs critique remains descriptive; integrate more independent evaluation to advance the argument.
The introduction effectively situates both the novel and its historical backdrop, showing a solid grasp of primary and secondary sources.
Historical context relies heavily on two generalist sources; integrating peer-reviewed scholarship would deepen contextual nuance and strengthen knowledge.
The closing summary of this section restates earlier points without adding new insight; integrate a critical counterpoint or deeper evaluation.
Including a distinct, titled table of contents improves navigation and demonstrates appropriate use of IB essay conventions.
Linking Maaliâs narrative to Hooleâs counterpoint demonstrates good engagement with contrasting perspectives and relevance to the question.
The âGood and Evilâ header neatly organizes the next analytical theme, supporting a clear sectional structure.
The introduction omits an explicit methodology statement; adding a concise rationale for chosen methods and sources would clarify the research design.
The distinction between reliability and credibility is explained accurately, demonstrating consistent use of subject-specific terminology.
The title and research question are presented with precision and direct focus, giving the investigation clear purpose from the outset.
The word count is clearly displayed on the title page, meeting the IB requirement for formatting.
The leader dots in the table of contents vary in length and spacing, detracting from readability; standardize dot count and alignment for consistency.
The conclusion restates major findings but omits methodological reflection or suggestions for further inquiry; consider adding this evaluative layer.
The conclusion remains predominantly summary-oriented; synthesizing insights would better demonstrate critical evaluation and depth.
The âWorks Citedâ heading is centered; IB format typically left-aligns section titles for consistent presentation.
This paragraph is densely packed and shifts between summary and critique; break it into focused analytical points to improve clarity.
The treatment of inside versus outside facts demonstrates good analytical depth and integration of historiographical theory.
The citation â(Karunatilaka Karunatilaka)â appears duplicated; review in-text citation formatting for consistency.
The topic sentence would be stronger if it explicitly linked the moral ambiguity discussion back to the research question.
The Mahinda Rajapaksa example is well-chosen to illustrate moral ambiguity, showing effective application of textual and contextual evidence.
This paragraph runs on extensively, which hinders readability; segmenting it would maintain reader engagement and clarity.
The âMetatextualityâ section is clearly labeled, which enhances the essayâs overall navigational structure.
The analysis of magical realism is largely descriptive; include a theoretical source on magical realism to ground this discussion conceptually.
Final paragraph reiterates summary rather than reflecting on methodological strengths and limitations; adding this reflection would round off the essay.
The bibliography contains duplicated entries and inconsistent styling (e.g., Duignan appears twice); revise to ensure uniform formatting.
Several reference entries truncate publication details, leaving citations incomplete; verify each entry includes full information.
The continuation of references in paragraph form disrupts bibliography consistency; merge these lines into the main list for uniformity.
The bibliography list on this page ends mid-entry, indicating missing text; ensure the final source entries are correctly completed.
